<!--
One PR per epic. Title format: [<EPIC-KEY>] <short summary>
Example: [UGA-2] Spark Structured Streaming job lands sensor readings as Parquet
-->

## Epic

<!-- Link the Jira epic this PR closes (one PR = one epic). -->
Closes: `<EPIC-KEY>`

## Acceptance criteria

<!--
Check each box you've satisfied from acceptance criteria. Reviewers use this to scope review.
-->

- [ ] AC 1
- [ ] AC 2
- [ ] AC 3

## How to verify

<!--
Concrete steps a reviewer can run on a fresh checkout to see this working.
Prefer CLI commands over UI walkthroughs.
-->

```
# example
docker compose down && docker compose up -d
# then ...
```

## Evidence

<!--
Paste the output that proves it works: terminal output, screenshots of dashboards,
sample query results, log lines. The demo path lives here so reviewers don't have
to run everything to believe you.
-->

## Peer reviewer

<!-- @-mention your assigned peer reviewer for this sprint. See the pairing matrix the mentor posts at sprint kickoff. -->

Reviewer: @<peer-handle>

## Notes for the mentor

<!--
Optional. Anything you want the mentor to weigh in the merge contest:
trade-offs you considered, things you'd do differently with more time,
parts you're least confident about. Be honest - it informs the rationale comment, not the decision against you.
-->
